title: Data Sources
subtitle: What tools should the AI be able to see?
intro: List the tools you live in day-to-day, with one line on what each is for and who at the company owns it. We'll connect the most important ones as part of the included 5 connections; the rest we'll add over time.

steps.title: Tools you'd like the AI to see
steps.intro: One row per tool. Rank by priority — most important first.

itemFields.label: Tool
itemFields.placeholder: Shopify, Klaviyo, the helpdesk, the project tracker…

itemFields.label: What it's for, in one line
Who at your company owns / manages it?
Access notes (scopes, restrictions, anything sensitive)
itemFields.placeholder: Read-only is fine. Don't expose the wholesale pricing table. We've got a service account ready.

steps.title: Tools or data we should NOT connect

itemFields.label: Tool / data source
itemFields.placeholder: Payroll system, the founder's personal email, …

fields.label: Anything else worth knowing about your data setup?
fields.placeholder: We migrated from Magento to Shopify last year so older order history is messy. The helpdesk is a self-hosted instance. We have a data warehouse but it's a mess — skip it for now.
